ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read, update, and delete all eligible role assignments and schedules for your company's directory [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the app to read and manage the eligible role-based access control (RBAC) assignments and schedules for your company's directory, without a signed-in user. This includes managing eligible directory role membership, and reading directory role templates, directory roles and eligible memberships.
Read, update, and delete all eligible role assignments and schedules for your company's directory [on] Microsoft Graph
